name: io.github.US1929/switchai
description: SwitchAI — AI agent for Italian energy tariff comparison. Analyzes electricity and gas bills, compares 44+ offers from 13 providers in real time, estimates savings with full ARERA regulated cost breakdown (transport, system charges, excise duties, VAT). Supports Claude Desktop MCP, ChatGPT GPT Actions, and WebMCP (Chrome 146+).

tools.name: get_offers
tools.description: Get the best energy offers for a given commodity (LUCE/GAS), zone, and yearly consumption

tools.name: analyze_bill_text
tools.description: Extract structured data from an Italian ARERA 2.0 energy bill text (consumption, spend, zone, supplier)

tools.name: get_market_indices
tools.description: Get live PUN (electricity) and PSV (gas) market indices with 30-day trend analysis

tools.name: compare_offer
tools.description: Compare a specific offer against current spend with full cost breakdown

tools.name: start_subscription
tools.description: Initiate GDPR double opt-in subscription flow for an energy offer

tools.name: get_subscription_status
tools.description: Check the status of a pending subscription by ID
